text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Is that... Brian?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(She's so powerful and independent. I bet no one
makes fun of her.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(To think, even someone as talented as her stays
so late to train...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Trainer, think up some extra training for me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I need to keep practicing if I'm ever gonna
catch up to the top racers.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to be some coward who's always
chasing after everyone.
choice_data_list: You should work at your own pace.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I warn her not to overdo it but agree to add more
to her regimen.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(One day, I'm going to be just like her. No, that's
not enough—I'll beat her!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huh... Is that Taishin?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hmm, that's some nice running she's doing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin is totally fired up and keeps at her
extra training until it's almost curfew.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
If that's the case, then I'll change my pace to
match Brian's!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I won't get stronger if I don't work at the same
pace as someone who's better than me!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You two! Fighting's prohibi—oh, Taishin. What
happened here?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And there's Brian. I know exactly what she'd say if
she heard you, Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
"Crush everyone by running the way you want
instead of forcing yourself to run like someone
else. It feels better, and you can get stronger
too."

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Personally, I would also suggest you run at your
own pace.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Grr!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin doesn't seem fully convinced, but
she nods bitterly and takes a break.
